title: Modular physiologic monitoring systems, kits, and methods
abstract: Systems, devices, methods, and kits for monitoring one or more physiologic and/or physical signals from a subject are disclosed. A system including patches and corresponding modules for wirelessly monitoring physiologic and/or physical signals is disclosed. A service system for managing the collection of physiologic data from a customer is disclosed. An isolating patch for providing a barrier between a handheld monitoring device with a plurality of contact pads and a subject is disclosed.
claims: 1. A patch interface, comprising: a substrate, the substrate having a first surface and a second surface opposite the first surface; an adhesive comprising a first surface and a second surface, the first surface of the adhesive being coupled to the second surface of the substrate, the second surface of the adhesive being formulated for attachment to the skin of a subject; one or more rivet studs coupled through a thickness of the substrate between the first surface and the second surface, at least one of the one or more rivet studs comprising a cap holding said at least one of the one or more rivet studs to the substrate; one or more patch interconnects coupled to the substrate, the one or more patch interconnects providing an electrically conducting interface; one or more electrically conducting traces arranged between the second surface of the substrate and the first surface of the adhesive; and at least one of one or more sensors and one or more electrodes; wherein the one or more stretchable electrically conducting traces couple at least one of the sensors or electrodes with one or more of the patch interconnects.
